title: Task
description: Canonical task shape. Every unit of work in the orchestra — whether user-initiated, delegated by the Lead, or auto-scheduled — is represented as a Task.

id.description: Unique task identifier. Format: task_ + 12 lowercase alphanumeric chars.

type.description: Task category. Free-form string scoped by convention: 'code-review', 'implement-feature', 'fix-bug', 'security-audit', 'write-tests', 'deploy', etc.

title.description: Human-readable one-line summary. Shown in Telegram status messages and CURRENT_TASKS.md.

payload.description: Task-type-specific data. Shape varies by task type — not validated beyond being a valid object. The receiving agent interprets it based on the type field.

requestedBy.description: Who created this task. Values: 'user' (direct request), a role string like 'lead' or 'frontend' (delegated/escalated), or 'scheduler' (cron-triggered).

assignedTo.description: The role agent responsible for executing this task.

priority.description: Execution priority. 'critical' tasks pre-empt the agent's current work queue.

parentTaskId.description: If this task was split from a larger task by the Lead, the parent task ID. Enables result aggregation.

completedAt.description: Set when status transitions to COMPLETED or CANCELLED.

result.description: The deliverable output of the task. Set on completion. Can be a summary, a file path, a diff, or structured content depending on task type.

why.description: Rationale for the approach taken. Required on completion — explains the 'why', not just the 'what'. Surfaced in Telegram reports and archived for learnings.

filesChanged.description: Paths of files created, modified, or deleted during execution. Relative to the agent's CWD.

error.description: Error message if the task failed or was blocked. Set when status is BLOCKED or when an unexpected failure occurs.

taskStatus.description: PLANNING: task received, agent reasoning about approach. IN_PROGRESS: actively executing. BLOCKED: waiting on external input or another agent. COMPLETED: done with result + rationale. CANCELLED: stopped by user or Lead. INTERRUPTED: process died mid-execution (auto-set on ungraceful shutdown).
